data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of switching modality (in-person to remote if sick), but there is no evidence provided that confirms this specific functionality is implemented or tested. While the linked use case mentions the ability for an in-person student to switch to virtual attendance, the prior steps do not include any evidence or checks related to the actual process of switching modalities due to illness. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the process or functionality for switching from in-person to remote attendance if a participant feels sick.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
